title: Martin Luquet tentative website
text:
This is my attempt to create my website using Quarto. I created this thanks to Cecilia Baldoni in a SORTEE workshop. Thank you Cecilia!
For now it’s shitty. First, I’d like to change the URL but I don’t know how. It’s already published though haha.
I aim at using this as a place of expression. Not just as a resume or something. I don’t want to oversell myself or anything of that kind. I’m not really into the career stuff anyway, but I’d like to use this to express my doubts about the whole scientific research entreprise, my insecurities, also provide a list of my publications but pinpoint their limits.
There may be a blog too!

title: Projects
text:
Ok here I’d like to do something a bit like Cecilia: https://cecibaldoni.github.io/content/project.html.
With the list of publications as a tab.
Also I’ll put my CV there I guess.

title: Blog
text: Yep maybe I’ll do a blog! I’ll also talk about art & culture, and other stuff, whatever I want to, and honestly it’s OK if you’re not interested there’s already so many people telling their lives on the Internet ’
